title: Run worktree squad retrospective
goal: Capture an evidence-led retrospective with explicit method, participant accounting, and action items after a squad assignment or phase.

steps.text: Gather loop logs, verification outputs, related assignment artifacts, and the frozen evidence packet for the checkpoint.
Choose the retrospective method: `roundtable`, `fan-out`, or `hybrid`. Use `hybrid` by default when persona fidelity or process quality is under evaluation.
Draft the retrospective using `worktree-squad-retrospective-template`, defaulting to the Starfish format, and record declared roles, actual participants, participant evidence, and scoped confidence.
Convert improvements into concrete action items with owner and checkpoint.

Append one retrospective entry to `worktree-squad-retrospectives.jsonl` using `worktree-squad-retrospective-log-contract`, including retrospective method, participant accounting, and feature/product/process confidence.
Pause for AJ review before applying any non-trivial process changes from retrospective findings.
Apply approved follow-ups and update next-iteration queue.

acceptanceCriteria: Retrospective includes the Starfish buckets: Keep Doing, Less Of, More Of, Stop Doing, and Start Doing
Retrospective names the chosen method and makes declared roles, actual participants, and participant evidence explicit
Action items include owner and next checkpoint
Retrospective JSONL entry is appended with contract-compliant fields, including scoped confidence
No non-trivial process change is applied without AJ review

verification.text: Confirm retrospective sections are complete, evidence-linked, and explicit about roles actually used
Confirm action items include owner, checkpoint, and confidence is separated into feature/product/process
